posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
pricing webinar1080×1080 78.6 KB

The marketplace community is happy to invite you to a special workshop by Asaf Sepkuty, monday.com’s Head of Pricing and Packaging.
Want to get an inside look at the best practices we’ve implemented for pricing at monday.com?

This is a great opportunity to learn how to think about product value and packaging. While the session will use examples from our app marketplace (especially feature-based pricing), the principles are valuable for anyone in the business of selling value.

When: 2025-08-12T00:00:00Z
Secure your spot now!
